author: anon-13168fa2
content: Observation: Chainlink key features for the chapter: (1) local-first SQLite, no cloud dependency, (2) session management with handoff notes that survive context resets, (3) hierarchical decomposition (issues → subissues), (4) dependencies/blocking, (5) quick workflow for fast issue+work, (6) breadcrumb actions for context compression resilience, (7) labels/priorities for organization, (8) works with any AI agent via context provider. The ELI5 doc frames it perfectly: 'a to-do list for AI assistants' / 'gives AI assistants a memory that survives between conversations.'
